name: Sardines Beach Towel - Room Essentials™
description:
Enhance your beach towel collection with this Sardines Beach Towel from Room Essentials™. Made of 100% cotton terry fabric, this beach towel helps you dry off quickly, and it features a graphic of sardines with green stripes and black borders for an eye-catching look. It makes a perfect pick for beach vacations, pool parties and beyond.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value
